category_sources: source_facts.description says dnsperf measures DNS performance by simulating network conditions; DNS-OARC describes dnsperf and resperf as DNS performance tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official DNS-OARC tool page use dnsperf.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official DNS-OARC tool page; official repository README provides build and usage documentation.
repo_sources: Official DNS-OARC/GitHub notice says dnsperf moved to the DNS-OARC Codeberg repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official DNS-OARC documentation describe DNS performance measurement and simulated network load.
